title: Dashboard Overview - Reading Your iMash Home Page
lede: The Overview page is the first thing you see when you log in. It gives you an at-a-glance snapshot of your whole account: total records, call performance, and a filterable list of every call.

steps.title: Open the Overview
steps.content:
1. Log in to iMash. You land on the Overview page automatically.
  2. To return here any time, click Overview at the top of the left-hand navigation.
  3. The page is read-only reporting — nothing you click here changes your data, so it is safe to explore.

images.caption: The Overview page: Total Statistics tiles, performance cards, filters, and the Calls table.
The Overview page: Total Statistics tiles, performance cards, filters, and the Calls table.

steps.title: Read the Total Statistics tiles
steps.content:
The top section, Total Statistics, shows all-time counts across your account. These numbers are independent of the date filter below them.

  • Contacts, Leads, and Accounts — how many CRM records you have.
  • Notes and Calendar entries — activity logged against your records.
  • AI agents, Campaigns, Phone numbers, and SIP providers — your calling setup.
  • Knowledge base, Sub accounts, and Custom tools — the rest of your workspace.

If you have sub-accounts, use the All owners dropdown in the top-right of this section to narrow the totals to one owner.

images.caption: All-time totals for contacts, leads, agents, phone numbers, and more.
All-time totals for contacts, leads, agents, phone numbers, and more.

steps.title: Check your call performance
steps.content:
Below the statistics is a strip of four performance cards. Unlike the tiles above, these do respect the date filter, so they always reflect the window you have selected.

  • Total calls — number of calls in the window, with average duration.
  • Total minutes — total talk time, with your success rate.
  • Total spent — your call spend, with cost per minute.
  • Avg cost / call — average price per call, with a daily spend estimate.

steps.title: Filter what you see
steps.content:
The Filters bar controls both the performance cards and the Calls table below.

  1. Pick a date range: Today, Yesterday, This Week, This Month, Last 30 Days, or a Custom Range.
  2. Narrow by Phone number, Agent, or Tags (for example Voicemail, Transfer, or No Answer).
  3. If you have sub-accounts, filter by Owner.
  4. Type a name into the Search customer box to find a specific caller.

steps.title: Explore the Calls table
steps.content:
The Calls table lists every call that matches your filters. Each row shows the contact or lead, the agent or campaign that handled it, date and time, duration, type, tags, and owner.

  1. Click a caller's name to open their Contact or Lead details in a side drawer.
  2. Use the eye icon in the Actions column to open the full call log, including the transcript and analysis.
  3. Page through results using the controls at the bottom of the table.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
If you run into any issues or have questions:

  • 📧 Email us at support@imash.io
  • 💬 Join our Discord community
  • 📚 Check out our API Reference
  • 🎥 Watch our video tutorials
